data.title: HTTPS Encryption
data.description: Ensures all data transmitted between users and the site is encrypted.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.3 encryption standard for all data exchanges.

data.title: Web Application Firewall
data.description: Protects the site against common web exploits.
data.technical_spec: Configured with AWS WAF to mitigate OWASP top 10 vulnerabilities.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Prevents downtime from distributed denial-of-service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Integrated with AWS Shield Advanced for proactive threat mitigation.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts routine audits to identify and address potential vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Penetration testing and vulnerability scanning using tools like Nessus.

data.title: Data Privacy Compliance
data.description: Adheres to stringent data protection regulations to maintain user privacy.
data.technical_spec: Compliance with GDPR and CCPA regulations.
